title: Griha Pravesh Puja
description: A sacred housewarming ceremony performed to purify and bless a new home before moving in. Includes Ganesh Puja, Vastu Shanti, and Griha Pravesh rituals with full mantra recitation and havan.

title: Satyanarayan Katha
description: A devotional recitation of the story of Lord Vishnu performed for prosperity, well-being, and fulfillment of wishes. Suitable for all auspicious occasions — new business, anniversaries, or Ekadashi.

title: Namkaran Ceremony
description: The traditional naming ceremony for a newborn. A beautiful ritual connecting the child to their lineage, nakshatra, and cosmic identity through Vedic mantras and blessings.

title: Vedic Birth Chart Reading
description: A comprehensive 60-minute Jyotish consultation covering your life path, karmic patterns, planetary periods (dashas), and key timing for major life events. Includes written summary.

title: Kundali Matching for Marriage
description: A detailed compatibility analysis of two birth charts using classical Ashtakoot and Dashakoot methods. Identifies strengths, challenges, and auspicious wedding muhurta (timing).

title: Home Vastu Assessment
description: An in-home Vastu Shastra consultation analyzing the energy flow of your living space. Covers room placement, entrance directions, elemental balance, and practical remedies without major renovation.

title: Office Vastu Consultation
description: Optimize your workspace for productivity, prosperity, and positive team dynamics. Covers desk placement, entrance energy, cash flow directions, and elemental corrections.

title: Guided Vedic Meditation Session
description: A deeply restorative 45-minute guided meditation rooted in Vedic tradition. Includes pranayama (breathwork), mantra repetition, and silent meditation. Available online or in-person.

title: Diwali Lakshmi Puja & Havan
description: Welcome prosperity and light into your home with a traditional Diwali Lakshmi puja followed by a purifying havan fire ceremony. Perfect for families seeking an authentic celebration.

title: Group Spiritual Counselling
description: A reflective 60-minute group session exploring Vedic philosophy, dharma, and practical spirituality for modern life. Suitable for families, couples, or small groups (up to 8 people).
